mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user_info (user_id, nickname, weight, height, age, gender, bmi, bmr, energy_kcal, fat, saturated_fat, carbohydrates, sugars, fiber, proteins, salt, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{nickname}, #{weight}, #{height}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{bmi}, #{bmr}, #{energyKcal}, #{fat}, #{saturatedFat}, #{carbohydrates}, #{sugars}, #{fiber}, #{proteins}, #{salt}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE nickname = VALUES(nickname), weight = VALUES(weight), height = VALUES(height), age = VALUES(age), gender = VALUES(gender), bmi = VALUES(bmi), bmr = VALUES(bmr), energy_kcal = VALUES(energy_kcal), fat = VALUES(fat), saturated_fat = VALUES(saturated_fat), carbohydrates = VALUES(carbohydrates), sugars = VALUES(sugars), fiber = VALUES(fiber), proteins = VALUES(proteins), salt = VALUES(salt), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, nickname, weight, height, age, gender, bmi, bmr, energy_kcal, fat, saturated_fat, carbohydrates, sugars, fiber, proteins, salt, status, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId}
